</style>

<!-- ═══ KUERRE VISUAL OVERRIDE — SOLO COLORES ═══ -->
<style>
#sidebar-logo-img { display: none !important; }
.sidebar-logo-text { font-size: 0 !important; color: transparent !important; }
.sidebar-logo-text span { display: none !important; }
.sidebar-logo-text::before { content: 'KUERRE'; display: block; font-family: 'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9060b8; }
:root { --gold: #9060b8; --gold2: #00e0a8; }
.login-logo span        { color: #9060b8 !important; }
.login-btn              { background: #9060b8 !important; color: #fff !important; }
.login-btn:hover        { background: #7a4aa0 !important; }
.login-input:focus      { border-color: #9060b8 !important; }
.nav-section-label      { color: rgba(192,144,224,.4) !important; }
.sidebar-item.active    { color: #9060b8 !important; background: rgba(144,96,184,.1) !important; }
.sidebar-item.active svg { opacity: 1; }
.tab.active             { color: #9060b8 !important; border-bottom-color: #9060b8 !important; }
.cnt-tab.active, .cnt-subtab.active { background: #9060b8 !important; color: #fafafa !important; }
.btn-add                { background: rgba(192,144,224,.18) !important; color: #9060b8 !important; border-color: rgba(192,144,224,.3) !important; }
.btn-add:hover          { background: rgba(192,144,224,.28) !important; }
.settings-section-title { color: #9060b8 !important; }
.form-input:focus, .form-textarea:focus, .form-select:focus { border-color: #9060b8 !important; }
</style>
<!-- ═══ / KUERRE VISUAL OVERRIDE ═══ -->
<script src="https://upload-widget.cloudinary.com/global/all.js"></script>
